name: Fingers Of The Time
overview: The events take place in the framework of social drama, about the selfish father (Asaad), who falls into the clutches of another woman, which is called (Farida), and forgets his first wife (Suad) and his children until they are displaced, and then time gathers them again after a period of separation, so that the father will pay the price of his ingrace and the cruelty of his heart for his children.

trailers.title: #قناة_ذكريات | المسلسل السعودي - أصابع الزمن الحلقة الأولى
